zh.Norbury, Greater London, England, United: 英國英格蘭倫敦諾波利
zh.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 英國爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Hyde I於大約1328年出生在英國爾斯托普特時，他的父親Sir Robert de Hyde26歲，母親Elizabeth Stavelegh22歲。他於1354年與Alice de Venables在英國爾海德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在英國爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯享年83歲。

zh-hans.Norbury, Greater London, England, United: 英国英格兰倫敦諾波利
zh-hans.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 英国爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Hyde I于大约1328年出生在英国爾斯托普特时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Hyde26岁，母亲Elizabeth Stavelegh22岁。他于1354年与Alice de Venables在英国爾海德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在英国爾馬布里諾波利 亞爾 馬爾帕斯享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Hyde I was born about 1328, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Hyde, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Stavelegh, was 22. He married Alice de Venables in 1354, in Hyde, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1410, in Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 83.

Il a épousé Alice de Venables en 1354, à Hyde, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

Er hat 1354 in Hyde, Cheshire, England Alice de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. ko.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Hyde I(이)가 대략 1328년 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Hyde(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stavelegh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1354년 영국 체실르 히드에서 Alice de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 체실르 마버이 노르버이 니아어 맬파스에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Alice de Venables em 1354, em Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Norbury near Malpas, Marbury, Cheshire,: норбури нир малпас, марбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Hyde I родился около 1328 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Hyde было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stavelegh, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Venables в 1354 г. в местности хид, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности норбури нир малпас, марбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.
